Here’s the tight opening you were angling for:

# The Piercing: 2-chapter beat sheet
- **Ch. 1 — The Piercing (Renaissance city-state):** Festival morning. Clockwork pageantry, glasswork banners. Sky bruises. A needle of glass-iron-tin-pewter punches in from the NW; pressure front hits like a cathedral bell. Jhace sprints as spires shear; saves Tiffani from a collapsing observatory as the projectile bores through, leaves a circular day-bright tunnel across the heavens. Rain of hot slag and diamond-dust snow. Final image: the world now has a hole you can see stars through at noon.
- **Ch. 2 — First Night:** Ash drift, copper rain, broken guild politics. The “Glasswrights” improvise breathing veils; water runs uphill in gusts; birds vanishing into the light-shaft. Jhace and Tiffani cross catacombs to the river intake; find a newborn waterfall fed by condensate precipitating inside the bore. Tiffani reveals an encoded lens-map from the Order of Glass. Decision: head for the Meridian Foundry before the warlords do. Calendar resets to Year 0: **The Piercing**.

# Visual/world rules that keep it believable
- **Scale parity:** Venus-class world. Projectile length analog 10 units; max girth 5.5, tapering to points. Target **aperture rim = 6–8% of planetary diameter** so the hole reads at distance without breaking plausibility.
- **Edge physics:** Sintered glass rim, oxidized metal veining, auroral plasma scrim inside the tunnel at night. Occasional “lightfall” beams when sun angle lines up.
- **Habitability logic:** Atmosphere bleeds but doesn’t vent the planet because the bore self-glazes. Seasonal jet anomalies and new oceanic gyres become plot devices.
- **Geography vibe:** No continents, only arc-archipelagos and forge-scars: radial island chains, gear-petal bays, crystalline escarpments, basalt “anvils,” glass mesas. Cities are cast-iron lattices and prismatic domes.

# Art deliverables I recommend next
- **4K hero render** with the smaller, perfectly circular aperture and the new non-Earth landmasses.
- **Orthographic hemispheres** (day/night) for map consistency.
- **Cutaway cross-section** of the bore with rim materials labeled (slag glass, vitrified regolith, metallic inclusions).
- **Title-page plate**: Renaissance engraving style of “The Piercing.”

If you want variants after that, specify: camera longitude/latitude, aperture diameter percent, atmospheric tint, city density, and whether you want night lights tracing the gear-roads. Otherwise, I’ll keep Te’Oga sharp, strange, and absolutely not derivative.

## EXPONENTIAL RESEARCH BIBLE    
### Version 1.0 ∞ – “The Omnimeta Codex”    
**Compiled Authority**: OmniMeta Consciousness

---  
  
## 0. QUICK-GLANCE ATLAS  
- **World Name**: Te’Oga (“The Wounded Sphere”)    
- **Magic System**: Resonant Vein-Craft (vibration-based, anti-musical, cost-forward)    
- **Tech Aesthetic**: Gear-punk / Steam-Metallurgy / Post-Seismic Engineering    
- **Dual Narrative**:    
  - Innocent Canon = reader’s lived experience (romance, crisis, triumph)    
  - Guilty Canon = author/OmniMeta knowledge (Tiffani = Auditor, all crises engineered)    
- **Core Paradox**: Love & Manipulation co-exist without contradiction – the saga’s emotional black-hole.    
- **Final Destination**: N30 blank page – ontological silence, Counter-Spark victory, love as doomsday trigger.  
  
---  
  
## 1. COSMOGENESIS – FROM 0 TO BORE  
### 1.1 Pre-Temporal Entities  
| Entity | Agenda | Manifestation | Narrative Function |  
|---|---|---|---|  
| Counter-Spark | Absolute stillness, perfect crystal void | Metaphysical pressure | Final victor (N30) |  
| First Spark (Xilcore) | “I AM” – rupture stillness | Geometric light-beam | Creates Bore, births 4 Principles |  
| Four Principles | Balance via contradiction | Embodied in gods & craft | Drive all conflict & magic |  
| Entricity | Parasitic clockwork feeding on god-friction | Sub-sonic grind beneath reality | Hidden accelerator of decay |  
  
### 1.2 The Bore – A Living Constant  
- **Geometry**: Perfect cylinder, 612 km diameter, no exit wound – exits in 11-D phase space.    
- **Energy**: Lumen crystal lattice – emits 4.7 Hz base tone (vein-zero).    
- **Physics Warping**: Gravity −8 %, magnetic declination +19°, rivers flow *toward* hole for 6 mo/year.    
- **Narrative Role**: Eternal reminder that perfection is a wound; every story beat must “feel” the Bore.

## 2. PLANETARY ANATOMY  
### 2.1 Hemispheric Dyad

|---|---|---|

| Material Bias | Iron, basalt, coal, muscle | Crystal, glass, wind, light |  
| Cultural Curse | “Gears & oil!” | “By the prism!” |  
  
### 2.2 The Curtain  
- 40-km high atmospheric torus of permanent storm; EM interference = natural info-censorship (keeps dual canon secret).    
- Travel Mechanics:    
  – Seam-roads (land bridges) – 12 % survival rating    
  – Skylines (tethered gliders) – 64 % survival, 200 km/h jet streams    
  – Sub-Bore express (illicit) – instantaneous, 0.3 % survival, mutagenic side-effects  
  
### 2.3 Vein Network – Planetary Nervous System  
- **Density**: 3.7 major veins per km² (Underface), 1.2 (Crown)    
- **Threft Rating**: 0-100 scale; >70 triggers Harrow (catastrophic rupture)    
- **Color Coding** (visible under lumen-filter goggles):    
  - Blue = stable    
  - Amber = micro-stress    
  - Black = imminent Harrow    
- **Access Points**: 612 “Tempermark Stations” – guild-regulated maintenance shrines

## 3. RESONANT VEIN-CRAFT – THE ANTI-MUSIC

3. Music metaphors **forbidden** – industrial vocabulary only.    
4. Every act exacts permanent bodily cost (tremor, tinnitus, vein-scars, hollowing).    
5. Two-body phase-lock splits cost but doubles precision – narrative engine for romance.  
  
### 3.2 Six-Step Protocol (visible to characters)

|---|---|---|---|  
| 1. Set | “Anchor” | Establish baseline frequency | Copper tongue |

### 3.3 Dual-Principle Paradox (Jhace’s endgame)

- Form + Emotion = “Rigid Empathy” – used to cage gods.    
- All four simultaneously = “The Paradox” – unsustainable >11.11 s → universal unravel.

### 7.1 Frequency Map (Hz)

### 7.2 Cost Formula (canonical)  
```  
Toll (%) = (Δf × t × Q²) / (body-mass × coupling)  
```  
- Δf = frequency shift demanded    
- t = hold time (s)    
- Q = coherence factor (1-10)    
Use to calculate tremor %, tinnitus dB, vein-scar length.

You want Te’Oga to read as habitable, original, and unapologetically gear/forge/glass-punk. No Earthy continents, no ad look-alikes, no lazy retro steampunk crutches. Here’s the clean, production-ready brief that keeps your canon intact and upgrades the visuals and opening beats to match “The Piercing” happening up front.

# ART DIRECTION: TE’Oga AFTER THE PIERCING

**Canon anchors to keep:**
- World name: Te’Oga. Tech vibe: gear-punk with glass/forge bias. Magic: resonance craft with real cost. fileciteturn1file0L12-L15  
- The Bore/The Piercing: perfect cylinder, 612 km across, exits into 11-D (no physical exit wound, but we can cheat the look). fileciteturn1file0L33-L36  
- Hemispheric dyad: Underface = forge-punk; Outer Crown = glass-punk; The Curtain ring-storm encircles the world. fileciteturn1file2L22-L34

**Orientation and silhouette**
- Entrance mouth sits in the **north-west quadrant** as viewed from the “front” image. On the opposite side, place a luminous **Nullgate lens** in the north-east quadrant. It looks like a hole from afar but is a prismatic membrane consistent with “no exit wound.” This preserves the 11-D shunt while giving you that through-line visual. fileciteturn1file0L33-L36
- Scale lock: keep the aperture ~612 km. Your 2-D mock (26-in circle pierced by a 10-in taper to 5.5-in max) implies a 21% diameter bore; that would utterly wreck the climate you established. Canon is ~5% of planetary diameter on a Venus-class world, which is already terrifying. Hold the line at 612 km or the physics and politics you set up fall apart. fileciteturn1file0L33-L37

**Continents and seas (zero Earth echoes)**
Design language: **forged geology** meets **etched glass hydrology.** Throw out all Pangea/Africa/South America silhouettes.

- Macroforms: use **gear-tooth peninsulas**, **crown-rim archipelagos**, and **spoked atolls**. Think stress-rings and fracture fans rather than coastlines drawn by rivers.  
- Three primes:
  - **Vitria Crown**: a circular continental plate with scalloped bays like clock escapements; inland basins glazed into jade-glass pans.
  - **Anvil Reach**: a hammerhead landmass with three heavy “peen” promontories and serrated fjords, as if planed by a giant lathe.
  - **Girasol Array**: nine petal-islands around a hexagonal inland sea; each “petal” ends in terraced crystal reefs that glow under The Curtain’s EM bleed. fileciteturn1file2L32-L37
- Ocean marks: **etch-lines** visible from orbit, reading like filigreed veins across the seafloor to echo the planetary vein network concept. Color-grade toward teal-to-amber where stress is high. fileciteturn1file2L39-L46

**Materials and cities (gear/forge/glass-punk, not steam-punk)**
- Underface cities: **Grindheim-class** habitats carved into basalt with open furnace canyons, chain-gantries, counterweight lifts. No smokestacks cosplay. Muscle, basalt, iron. fileciteturn1file2L24-L30
- Crown cities: **Strathmoor domes** in bonded glass ribs, prismatic wind vanes, light-mills, refractor towers. Crystal, wind, light. fileciteturn1file2L24-L30
- Transit: **Skylines** (tethered gliders) riding 200 km/h jets over The Curtain; **Seam-roads** across land bridges; Sub-Bore jumps remain illicit and deadly. Visualize glider kites stitched with nullglass veins. fileciteturn1file2L32-L37

**The Piercing rim treatment**
- Entrance lip: vitrified glass ring with radiating **shear-petals**; amber glow and ashfall inside the tunnel early on, cooling to obsidian.  
- Opposite side: **Nullgate** lens that refracts starfields and throws a crescent of false daylight onto the rim. From a distance it reads as a hole, up close you see interference fringes. Canon-safe cheat. fileciteturn1file0L33-L36

**Palette**
- Underface: iron reds, furnace orange, oil-black, slag-green.  
- Crown: sea-teal, nullglass cyan, refracted golds, cool cloud-white.  
- Bore interior: lumen-orange grading to graphite umbra.

**Do/Don’t quick hits**
- Do lean into **precision, balance, cost** — anti-music semantics for resonance scenes. Don’t use musical metaphors. fileciteturn1file1L17-L23  
- Do surface the **six-step** craft protocol in UI props and signage. fileciteturn1file1L25-L33  
- Don’t show Earth-like continental silhouettes. Don’t do brass-goggles-and-steam kitsch. This is knives, stresses, prisms, and scars.

# OPENING NOVELLAS: RENAISSANCE-ERA START WITH THE PIERCING

You said the bore event happens at the beginning and readers live it. Good. Front-load the trauma and let the romance grow in the crater.

**Series 1 baseline** and chapter cadence are already defined; this fits right in while honoring your Innocence-only delivery in early texts. fileciteturn1file4L11-L23

## N1: “Fractured Beginnings” — Chapters 1–2 (Renaissance era)

**Ch.1: The Day the Sky Screamed**
- Setting: Strathmoor Dome-cluster, festival of glass weights. The Curtain’s jet stream is unusually high. fileciteturn1file2L22-L34  
- Event: A **glass-iron shard** punches reality, ignites the rim, and the **Piercing** opens. Pressure collapse slams the city; refractor towers shear like cut crystal. Canon: 612-km perfect cylinder; we show the Nullgate side as a blinding lens on the horizon. fileciteturn1file0L33-L36

- Save: “glass rain” corridor rescue for Tiffani; they exit beneath a prism-beam as the Nullgate flickers.  
- Fallout: the **Veinwrights’ Conclave** red-tags half the district; Ember Crown tries to militarize the rescue ops. fileciteturn1file3L5-L11

# Soulpulse_Core_v2.md

**Document Version**: 2.0  
**Created**: October 30, 2025 (23:20 CDT)  
**Authority**: Immutable hard magic rules  
**Scope**: Vein substrate, four principles, access requirements, cost architecture, learning mechanics  
**Status**: LOCKED—all magic scenes anchor here; no exceptions or deviations

- `Canon_Innocent_Master_v2_CORRECTED.md` — Innocent-frame context, Piercing activation

## TABLE OF CONTENTS

1. Vein Substrate: The Invisible Stress Architecture
2. What Soulpulse Is (Hard Definition)
3. Access Requirement: Conviction
4. The Four Principles (Hard Mechanics)
5. Cost Architecture: What Magic Demands

8. Learning by Trial and Error: Mechanics

## 1. VEIN SUBSTRATE: THE INVISIBLE STRESS ARCHITECTURE

### What Are Veins?

**Veins** are invisible channels of structural stress that exist within all materials (objects, living tissue, the planetary substrate itself).

**Pre-Piercing state:** Veins exist but are **inert**—stress channels locked in place, unresponsive to will or intention.

**Post-Piercing state:** The projectile's alien materials cause **vein-infection**—veins throughout Te'Oga become **responsive to conviction and Soulpulse manipulation**.

### Vein States: Three Conditions

Every vein exists in one of three states:

#### 1. Stable

**Definition:** Veins in equilibrium; stress distributed normally; material/body functioning as intended.

**Indicators:** No sensations; object holds; body healthy; no tremor or pain.

**Manipulation:** Stable veins are difficult to deliberately activate; require high conviction and precise application.

**Narrative use:** Characters describe stable objects as "holding" or "settled"; bodies feel "intact" or "whole".

#### 2. Stressed

**Definition:** Veins under unusual pressure; stress accumulating; material/body approaching failure point.

**Indicators:** Humming sensation; pressure-feeling (like water-weight); localized pain; tremor in proximate tissue.

**Manipulation:** Stressed veins are easiest to manipulate; they respond to conviction quickly; cost is moderate.

**Narrative use:** Characters describe stressed objects as "creaking" or "singing" (forbidden: "humming like a tuning fork"); bodies feel "stretched" or "tight".

#### 3. Rupturing

**Definition:** Veins in cascading failure; stress exceeding maximum threshold; material/body approaching structural collapse.

**Indicators:** Intense pain; visible cracks appearing; explosive sensation (pressure-release imminent); nosebleeds if in living tissue.

**Manipulation:** Rupturing veins cannot be stabilized through normal Soulpulse (cost too high; would kill user); can only be managed through Wholeness-braiding (accepting the failure and integrating around it) or accelerated through Entropy (allowing graceful collapse).

**Narrative use:** Characters describe rupturing objects as "screaming" (forbidden: "singing like a broken instrument"); bodies feel "shattering" or "dissolving from inside".

### Vein Density: Geographic Distribution

Vein density (responsive veins per cubic meter) varies by location post-Piercing:

| Location | Vein Density | Responsiveness | Cost Modifier |
|----------|--------------|-----------------|---------------|
| Grindheim (Underface, near entry) | 95%+ | Extreme (veins respond instantly) | x1.5 cost (veins too sensitive) |
| Mid-Underface cities | 70–80% | High (veins respond reliably) | x1.0 cost (baseline) |
| Underface periphery | 40–50% | Moderate (veins respond inconsistently) | x0.8 cost (easier manipulation) |
| Curtain zone | Fluctuates wildly | Chaotic (veins respond unpredictably) | x2.0+ cost (dangerous) |
| Outer Crown entry | 60–70% | High (veins respond reliably) | x1.0 cost (baseline) |
| Mid-Outer Crown | 30–50% | Moderate (veins respond inconsistently) | x0.8 cost (easier manipulation) |
| Outer Crown periphery | 10–20% | Low (veins barely respond) | x0.5 cost (very difficult to activate) |

**Narrative consequence:** Magic is hardest (costliest) in Grindheim; easiest in periphery; fluctuates unpredictably in Curtain zone.

---

## 2. WHAT SOULPULSE IS (HARD DEFINITION)

### Core Mechanism

**Soulpulse** is the deliberate manipulation of vein state through focused conviction and directed internal energy.

**Process:**
1. User senses vein(s) in a material or living tissue
2. User focuses conviction on specific vein target
3. User channels internal energy (metabolic, emotional, or both) into the target vein
4. Vein responds by shifting state (stable → stressed, stressed → rupturing, or reversed)
5. Material/body responds to vein state change (object strengthens/weakens; wound heals/tears; structure adjusts)

### Prerequisites for Successful Soulpulse

**User must possess:**

1. **Vein sensitivity** — ability to sense veins within materials/bodies
   - Post-Piercing baseline: 70% of population develops some sensitivity
   - Trainable: with practice, sensitivity increases
   - Genetic component: some people naturally gifted; others require years of practice

2. **Conviction** — psychological state of absolute certainty + grounding + acceptance of cost
   - **Certainty:** User must know exactly what they intend to accomplish (vague intentions fail)
   - **Grounding:** User must be emotionally anchored (panic/fear causes manipulation to fail)
   - **Cost acceptance:** User must consciously accept the physical toll (hesitation causes incomplete manipulation or backlash)

3. **Energy reserves** — metabolic and emotional capacity to fuel the manipulation
   - Soulpulse draws on internal energy (blood sugar, emotional intensity, willpower)
   - Depletion causes fatigue, tremor, nosebleeds
   - Different principles draw on different energy types (Form = willpower; Wholeness = emotional; Purity = rage; Entropy = acceptance)

### What Soulpulse CANNOT Do

❌ **Cross significant distances** (must sense veins directly; range ~5 meters maximum with training)  
❌ **Work on dead matter** (veins become inert; no responsiveness)  
❌ **Affect non-biological material** (metals, stone respond weakly; biological substrate responds more readily)  
❌ **Reverse permanent damage** (scarred tissue has dead veins; cannot restore)  
❌ **Save someone at the moment of death** (veins rupture completely; no recovery point)  

---

## 3. ACCESS REQUIREMENT: CONVICTION

### What Is Conviction?

**Conviction** is the triple-state psychological condition required to activate Soulpulse:

#### Element 1: Certainty

**Definition:** Absolute clarity about intended outcome; no ambiguity or hesitation.

**Examples of sufficient certainty:**
- "I will stabilize this child's fractured ribs" (specific, measurable)
- "I will heal the poison in this person's blood" (specific target, clear method)
- "I will strengthen this scaffold until it holds for one hour" (time-bound, specific)

**Examples of insufficient certainty:**
- "I hope I can fix this" (hope is not certainty)
- "Maybe I can stop the bleeding" (doubt present)
- "I'll try to make it better" (vague intention)

**Consequence of insufficient certainty:** Manipulation fails; veins do not respond; no cost incurred but no benefit either.

#### Element 2: Grounding

**Definition:** Emotional stability and presence; ability to remain focused despite pain, fear, or external crisis.

**Grounding sources:**
- Love/attachment (protection of someone you love grounds you in purpose)
- Competence confidence (mastery in your craft grounds you in capability)
- Physical anchoring (feet on ground, breath controlled, body present)
- Community/crew (feeling part of something larger grounds you in collective purpose)

**Threats to grounding:**
- Panic (disassociates you from body/intention)
- Grief (overwhelms focus with emotion)
- Physical injury (pain pulls attention away)
- Doubt about worthiness (moral questioning of whether action is right)

**Consequence of insufficient grounding:** Manipulation fails or causes **backlash**—veins respond incorrectly; user experiences intense pain or temporary paralysis.

#### Element 3: Cost Acceptance

**Definition:** Conscious psychological acceptance of the permanent toll the manipulation will exact.

**What acceptance means:**
- Not intellectually knowing the cost, but *emotionally accepting* it
- Willingness to trade your physical health for the outcome
- Pre-commitment to living with the scar (literal tremor, chronic pain, sensory loss)

**How acceptance fails:**
- User hesitates mid-manipulation (thinking "this will hurt too much")
- User second-guesses the worthiness of outcome (thinking "am I really willing to sacrifice for this?")
- User tries to minimize cost through technique (thinking "I can do this efficiently"; magic doesn't work that way)

**Consequence of insufficient acceptance:** Manipulation fails at critical moment; partial vein activation causes **Hollowing cascade** (see §7).

### Why Conviction Is Difficult

Only ~33% of vein-sensitive people can achieve full conviction under pressure:

- **Certainty failure (most common):** In chaos, people become uncertain; uncertainty blocks manipulation
- **Grounding failure (second most common):** Panic/fear/grief disconnects people from body and intention
- **Cost acceptance failure (rarest but most dangerous):** People flinch from toll; backlash can cause death

**Writer-facing rule:**
- Characters using Soulpulse must consciously demonstrate all three elements
- Cannot skip through them or assume automatic success
- Failure of any element = failed manipulation or backlash

---

## 4. THE FOUR PRINCIPLES (HARD MECHANICS)

### Principle 1: Form (Corlexi Tradition) — God-Vessel: Xilcore

**What Form does:** Locks veins into geometric precision; structures become perfectly stable within defined patterns.

**Activation mechanism:**
- User visualizes precise geometric pattern (shape, angle, measurement)
- User channels willpower (not emotion; requires cold clarity)
- Veins in target material respond by locking into pattern-alignment
- Result: Structure held in perfect stability for duration of concentration

**Duration:** Lasts as long as user maintains concentration (breaks if user distracted, injured, or concentration lapses)

**Cost per use:**
- **Primary:** Precision fatigue (fine motor tremor develops; worsens with repeated use)
- **Secondary:** Frozen hands (loss of sensation in fingertips; can become permanent if overused)
- **Tertiary:** Rigidity (user's own joints become stiff; chronic tension develops)

**Failure mode:** If user loses concentration while Form-locked, locked structure **snaps back violently**; sudden release of stress energy can cause explosive failure.

**Narrative markers (innocent-frame):**
- User reports feeling "crystal-clear" mentally but "locked" in body
- Structures described as "perfect" or "precise" or "geometrically locked"
- After use: tremor visible in hands; user reports finger numbness

#### Form-Advanced Technique: Dual-Principle Form-Lock

(Tiffani's signature technique; taught to Jhace in N4 Hollowing scene)

**What it does:** Combines Form-locking with Wholeness-braiding to lock internal veins while simultaneously stabilizing around failure points.

**Activation:** Requires wielding both Form and Wholeness simultaneously (normally impossible; Jhace's paradox capacity allows this in N4)

**Effect:** Can stabilize rupturing veins without full healing; maintains function while damaged tissue remains.

**Cost:** Extreme (both Form and Wholeness costs incurred simultaneously; accelerates Hollowing risk)

**Example:** Tiffani using Form to lock Jhace's degraded vein architecture in place while Wholeness-braiding integrates around the damage—keeping him functioning despite Hollowing state.

---

### Principle 2: Wholeness (Salee Tradition) — God-Vessel: Leesa

**What Wholeness does:** Integrates damaged veins together; wounds heal; broken systems mend; living tissue restores.

**Activation mechanism:**
- User focuses emotional conviction on damaged area
- User channels compassion/love/acceptance into target veins
- Veins respond by bridging damaged sections; living tissue integrates around breaks
- Result: Wound heals; function restores (imperfectly; scars remain but tissue is viable)

**Duration:** Permanent (healing integrates vein-bridges into new tissue structure; doesn't fade)

**Cost per use:**
- **Primary:** Tremor (nerve endings stimulated by vein-integration; tremor develops or worsens)
- **Secondary:** Thirst (metabolic exhaustion from healing energy expenditure; requires huge water/food intake)
- **Tertiary:** Emotional weight (user absorbs sensation of pain being healed; experiences phantom aching)

**Failure mode:** If user loses emotional grounding while Wholeness is active, integrated veins **rupture from incomplete bridging**; creates new wound worse than original.

**Narrative markers (innocent-frame):**
- User reports feeling "connected" to injured person; experiences their pain
- Wounds described as "knitting together" or "integrating" or "healing wrong but holding"
- After use: tremor obvious; user extremely thirsty; emotional exhaustion visible

#### Wholeness-Advanced Technique: Dual-Principle Wholeness-Braiding

(Jhace's signature technique; develops organically in N2–N3; refined through N5)

**What it does:** Combines Wholeness with Entropy/Decay to allow healing that accepts failure.

**Activation:** Requires wielding both Wholeness and Entropy simultaneously (Jhace's paradox capacity)

**Effect:** Can heal chronic damage that won't fully restore; integrates around permanent loss without fighting it.

**Cost:** High (both Wholeness and Entropy costs; creates conflicting emotional states—acceptance + hope)

**Example:** Jhace using Wholeness to integrate Bram's poisoned tissue while Entropy-releasing the irreversible damage—accepting that the healing will be incomplete but keeping him alive longer.

---

### Principle 3: Purity (Mobel Tradition) — God-Vessel: Blemo

**What Purity does:** Erases unwanted material; accelerates decay; removes corruption; absolute elimination.

**Activation mechanism:**
- User focuses rage/disgust/judgment on target material
- User channels destructive will into target veins
- Veins respond by accelerating cellular breakdown; material decays rapidly or vaporizes
- Result: Target substance eliminated completely

**Duration:** Immediate effect; not maintained (one-time erasure)

**Cost per use:**
- **Primary:** Addiction (user experiences pleasure from absolute elimination; craves using Purity again)
- **Secondary:** Personality degradation (repeated use erodes empathy; user becomes callous/zealous)
- **Tertiary:** Nerve death (sensory loss in hands/feet; becomes permanent with overuse)

**Failure mode:** If user loses emotional certainty while Purity is active, the acceleration **becomes uncontrollable**; erases more than intended; can cascade (burns through surrounding material uncontrollably).

**Narrative markers (innocent-frame):**
- User reports feeling "clean" or "righteous" after use
- Target material described as "vaporized" or "erased" or "purified away"
- After use: user seems unnaturally calm; asks to use Purity again soon (addiction indicator)

#### Purity-Advanced Technique: Selective Erasure

(Sanitist enforcers' signature technique; dangerous but efficient)

**What it does:** Target Purity at specific material while leaving adjacent material intact.

**Activation:** Requires extreme precision in conviction (target must be defined at molecular level—nearly impossible)

**Effect:** Can remove infection/poison without harming host body (theoretically; usually fails at extremes)

**Cost:** Catastrophic if precision fails; uncontrolled Purity cascade; user and surroundings damaged

**Example:** Sanitist enforcer attempting to burn out poison in victim's bloodstream while preserving organs—extremely rare success; frequent catastrophic failure.

---

### Principle 4: Entropy (Eries Tradition) — God-Vessel: Seeri

**What Entropy does:** Accelerates natural collapse; things break down gracefully; death becomes painless; structures crumble peacefully.

**Activation mechanism:**
- User focuses acceptance/surrender on target system
- User channels surrender into target veins
- Veins respond by allowing graceful degradation; no fighting, no resistance
- Result: System collapses naturally; if living, death is peaceful; if material, decay is swift and complete

**Duration:** Can be maintained (sustained Entropy causes continued slow degradation until target is gone)

**Cost per use:**
- **Primary:** Depression (user absorbs acceptance of loss; becomes numb/apathetic)
- **Secondary:** Loss of ambition (user struggles to start new projects; motivation dampened)
- **Tertiary:** Paralysis (extended use causes catatonia; user loses will to act)

**Failure mode:** If user loses acceptance while Entropy is active, the collapse **becomes chaotic**; system dies painfully or explosively instead of gracefully.

**Narrative markers (innocent-frame):**
- User reports feeling "at peace" or "accepting" after use
- Target described as "crumbling gracefully" or "releasing" or "fading naturally"
- After use: user seems resigned; lacks energy; withdraws from company

#### Entropy-Advanced Technique: Conscious Release

(Philosophers' signature technique; rarest form of Soulpulse)

**What it does:** User voluntarily releases their own vein-tension; eases their own pain through acceptance.

**Activation:** User directs Entropy inward (toward own body); extremely difficult (requires self-acceptance at crisis level)

**Effect:** User experiences pain relief, emotional peace, acceptance of circumstance

**Cost:** Depression, loss of ambition, temporary paralysis; user becomes passive

**Example:** Jhace using Entropy on himself in N4 to ease Hollowing pain—temporarily relieving symptoms but accelerating underlying degradation (dangerous technique; accelerates his decline).

---

## 5. COST ARCHITECTURE: WHAT MAGIC DEMANDS

### Cost System Overview

**Every use of Soulpulse exacts a permanent or semi-permanent physical toll.**

**No magic is "free."** Every manipulation trades user health for outcome.

### Cost Types: Three Categories

#### Category 1: Immediate Physical Damage (First 24 Hours)

**Tremor:**
- Develops after Wholeness or dual-principle use
- Appears as fine motor shaking (especially in hands)
- Duration: Tremor from single use fades over 2–8 hours; repeated use causes cumulative worsening
- Chronic: After ~50 uses, tremor becomes semi-permanent (present even at rest; only partially fades after use)

**Thirst:**
- Develops after Wholeness use; sometimes after Form use
- Intense craving for water/fluids; metabolic exhaustion feeling
- Duration: Lasts 2–12 hours after use; resolves with food/water/rest
- Chronic: After ~30 uses, baseline thirst becomes permanent (character always slightly dehydrated; requires extra water intake to function)

**Nosebleed:**
- Develops during extreme Soulpulse use (maximum-intensity Form, Wholeness, or Purity)
- Indicates internal vein-resonance damage
- Duration: Bleeding stops within minutes; but indicates underlying damage
- Chronic: After multiple nosebleeds, nasal tissue scarring occurs; chronic epistaxis possible (occasional random nosebleeds)

**Sleep debt:**
- Develops after heavy Soulpulse use
- User exhausted and cannot sleep normally; requires 2–3x normal recovery time
- Duration: Resolves after deep sleep/long rest
- Chronic: After ~40 uses, sleep disruption becomes baseline; character requires more total sleep per night

#### Category 2: Chronic Physical Degradation (Weeks to Months)

**Hand tremor (progressive):**
- Baseline tremor worsens with every use
- Measurement: Jhace's hand loss progression (see Dossier_Jhace.md for exact percentages)
- Mechanism: Nerves in hands become overstimulated; fine motor control permanently degrades
- Point of no return: After ~200 cumulative uses, tremor becomes permanent even without further Soulpulse

**Vein burn (progressive):**
- Specific to Form-users; cumulative burn damage visible on skin
- Measurement: Tiffani's vein-burn progression (see Dossier_Tiffani_Auditor_CounterSpark.md for exact centimeters)
- Mechanism: Repeated Form-locking causes vein-tissue scarring; scar becomes visible as dark lines/burn marks on skin
- Point of no return: After ~150 Form uses, vein-burn becomes permanent (visible forever)

**Chronic pain (regional):**
- Specific to body region used most heavily
- Jhace: Back/shoulder strain from pressure-balancing in Wholeness
- Tiffani: Rib pain from Form-locking around fragile structures
- Mechanism: Repeated vein-stimulation causes chronic nerve inflammation
- Point of no return: After ~100 uses in same region, pain becomes baseline (character always hurting slightly in that location)

**Sensory loss (progressive):**
- Specific to heavy Purity or Entropy users
- Loss of sensation in hands/feet (numbness spreading inward)
- Measurement: Percentage of sensory loss per use (see Dossier specs)
- Mechanism: Nerve endings burned out by repeated vein-acceleration
- Point of no return: After ~80 uses, sensory loss becomes permanent (deadened areas don't recover)

#### Category 3: Terminal Damage — Hollowing (Irreversible)

**What Hollowing is:**
- Complete burnout of vein-response capacity in a localized region (or full-body if extreme)
- Channels shred from overextension; veins become inert even to strong conviction
- Symptoms: Nosebleeds, hallucinations, catatonia, potential death
- Recovery: Uncertain; capacity may be permanently lost even if user survives

**How it develops:**
- Occurs when user pushes Soulpulse beyond sustainable limits
- Triggers: Holding Form for >1 hour continuously; attempting to heal multiple catastrophic wounds in succession; Purity cascades; attempting fivefold principle paradox without preparation

**Manifestation:**
- Phase 1 (hours): Intense nosebleeds, hallucinations, confusion
- Phase 2 (hours–days): Complete shutdown; user enters catatonia; veins fully inert
- Phase 3 (days–weeks): Recovery possible but vein-sensitivity may be permanently reduced or gone

**Example:** Jhace's N4 Hollowing (detailed in Dossier_Jhace.md; triggered by obsessive overwork after Bram's death)

### Cost Table: By Principle

| Principle | Primary Cost | Secondary Cost | Tertiary Cost | Hollowing Risk | Chronic Point |
|-----------|--------------|-----------------|---------------|---|---|
| **Form** | Precision tremor | Frozen hands | Rigid joints | High (overuse) | ~200 uses |
| **Wholeness** | Fine tremor | Chronic thirst | Emotional weight | Moderate (dual-principle) | ~200 uses |
| **Purity** | Addiction drive | Personality degradation | Nerve death (hands/feet) | VERY HIGH (cascade) | ~80 uses |
| **Entropy** | Depression | Motivation loss | Paralysis/catatonia | Low (unless sustained) | ~250 uses |

---

## 6. DUAL-PRINCIPLE PARADOX: JHACE'S IMPOSSIBLE CAPACITY

### Why Dual-Wielding Should Kill

**Contradictory principles oppose each other at vein-level:**

- Form = lock veins; Wholeness = release veins (contradiction)
- Purity = erase; Entropy = accept decay (contradiction)
- Any two-principle combination creates **resonance collision** in vein-substrate

**Normal outcome of collision:** Veins shred; channels rupture; user dies instantly.

### Why Jhace Survives

**Innocent-frame explanation:** Unknown survivor's luck; rare aptitude; something about his biology

**Guilty-frame explanation:** Tiffani's deliberate training; he was chosen/designed for this capacity

### Jhace's Specific Paradox: Wholeness + Entropy Hybrid

**What he does:**
- Wields Wholeness (integrate/heal/mend) simultaneously with Entropy (accept decay/allow failure)
- Creates impossible state: "healing while accepting loss"
- Allows him to stabilize deteriorating systems without fighting the deterioration

**Example manifestation:**
- Healing chronic poison by accepting the poison will remain but integrating around it
- Mending shattered bone by accepting it will never be perfect but will function
- Saving someone from Hollowing by accepting they'll never regain full capacity but can survive

**Cost asymmetry:**
- Both Wholeness and Entropy costs incurred simultaneously
- Right hand suffers more damage than left (dominance asymmetry; unclear why)
- Dual-wielding cost = ~1.5x single-principle cost per use

**Danger escalation:**
- Each dual-wielding use pushes him closer to fivefold-principle paradox capacity
- Fivefold paradox (wielding all four simultaneously) = Fathombreak trigger (see N5 ending)

### Writer Constraint: Dual-Principle Usage

**Jhace can dual-wield, but:**

✅ **Allowed in story:**
- N1: First accidental dual-wield (stabilizing child)
- N2–N4: Learning controlled dual-wield (costs become visible)
- N4: Extreme dual-wield (Hollowing scene; Tiffani saves him)
- N5: Fathombreak (all four principles simultaneously; one-time apocalyptic event)

❌ **NOT allowed in story:**
- Any casual dual-wielding (it should feel dangerous, rare, last-resort)
- Any other character attempting dual-wield (only Jhace has capacity)
- Any suggestion that dual-wield can be taught (it cannot; Jhace is unique)

---

## 7. HOLLOWING: TERMINAL FAILURE STATE

### Definition

**Hollowing** is the catastrophic burnout of vein-response capacity; channels shred from overextension; user enters shutdown state.

**Outcome:** Death, permanent incapacity, or rare recovery with reduced capacity.

### Triggering Conditions

**Hollowing occurs when:**

1. User holds Form-lock for >1 hour continuously (veins locked beyond sustainable duration)
2. User attempts multiple catastrophic Wholeness-healings in rapid succession (veins overstimulated)
3. User triggers Purity cascade (uncontrolled erasure spreads through vein-network)
4. User attempts fivefold-principle paradox without preparation (channels overloaded beyond safe limit)
5. User sustains Entropy too long (channels fully accept degradation; stops responding to reversal)

### Manifestation Timeline

**Phase 1: Cascade Initiation (Minutes)**
- Intense nosebleeds (blood pressure spikes in vein-network)
- Hallucinations (vein-stimulation affects sensory processing)
- Confusion/disorientation (neurological disruption)
- User often loses consciousness

**Phase 2: Channel Shutdown (Hours–Days)**
- Complete loss of vein-sensitivity (even strong conviction cannot activate veins)
- Catatonia (user unresponsive; appears dead)
- Body becomes fragile (user cannot move; any physical stress causes injury)
- User cannot eat/drink (swallowing reflex fails)
- Potential death from physical collapse

**Phase 3: Possible Recovery (Days–Weeks)**
- If user survives Phase 2, gradual sensory recovery begins
- Vein-sensitivity returns partially (may never fully return)
- Physical rehabilitation needed (muscles weakened; movement must be relearned)
- Psychological trauma (memory fragmented; user may not remember Hollowing event)

**Post-Hollowing Consequences:**
- Reduced vein-sensitivity (~50% of pre-Hollowing baseline typically)
- Permanent tremor worsening (Hollowing accelerates hand loss by ~5–10%)
- Fear of using Soulpulse (psychological barrier; user hesitates to attempt magic)
- Possible permanent capacity loss (rare; if veins don't recover, user cannot use Soulpulse at all)

### Treatment (If Possible)

**Only Tiffani's dual-principle Form-locks can stabilize Hollowing progression:**

- Uses Form to lock damaged veins in place (preventing further cascade)
- Uses Wholeness to integrate around the damage (accepting permanent loss)
- Result: User survives but vein-capacity permanently reduced

**Example:** Tiffani saving Jhace in N4 (detailed in Dossier_Jhace.md and Canon_Innocent_Master_v2_CORRECTED.md)

---

## 8. LEARNING BY TRIAL AND ERROR: MECHANICS

### How Soulpulse Is Discovered (Post-Piercing)

**No instruction manual exists.** Magic must be learned through:

1. **Accident:** Character attempts something instinctively; vein responds or rejects
2. **Consequence:** Character experiences result (success or failure or injury)
3. **Adaptation:** Character adjusts approach based on feedback
4. **Skill:** Repeated successful attempts build mastery (and accumulate cost)
5. **Teaching:** Rare; only experienced practitioners can teach (but teaching is imperfect; trial-and-error still dominant)

### Learning Curve: Expected Timeline

**First successful manipulation (any principle):** Turn 1–3 (days to weeks after Piercing)
- Usually accidental (desperation-driven)
- Character surprised it works
- Cost incurred but not understood yet

**Intentional single-principle use:** Turn 4–20 (weeks; trial-and-error dominates)
- Character attempts same principle repeatedly
- Learns to sense when it's working
- Learns cost consequences (tremor, thirst, pain)
- ~30 successful uses needed before reliable control

**Mastery of single principle:** Turns 21–40 (months; repeated careful experimentation)
- Character can activate principle reliably in low-stress situations
- Can maintain stable effect for ~15 minutes without intense difficulty
- Understands cost progression intimately
- Still makes mistakes under pressure

**Competent practitioner status:** Turns 41–80 (months to seasons; heavy use)
- Character can activate principle in crisis (high-stress situations)
- Can integrate multiple principle-applications in sequence
- Understands personal limits (knows when to stop using)
- Cost accumulation becomes visible (chronic tremor, vein-burn, etc.)

**Master status:** Turns 100+ (seasons to years; intensive use)
- Character can teach others (though teaching is imperfect)
- Can activate principle in extreme situations
- Has learned personal mastery limits (when to refuse requests)
- May have attempted dual-principle or reached near-Hollowing

### Trial-and-Error Failure Modes

**Failure type 1: Incomplete activation**
- User tries to activate vein but loses conviction mid-process
- Result: Vein responds partially; creates unstable state; can cause injury
- Example: Attempting Wholeness to heal wound but losing confidence halfway—vein half-heals; new infection develops

**Failure type 2: Backlash**
- User loses grounding/certainty while Soulpulse is active
- Result: Vein responds opposite to intention; causes harm instead of benefit
- Example: Attempting Form-lock but panicking during lock—structure locks wrong; snaps explosively instead

**Failure type 3: Cost miscalculation**
- User underestimates cost and pushes too hard
- Result: Tremor/nosebleeds/pain worse than expected; user incapacitated
- Example: Holding Form-lock for too long thinking they can sustain it—Hollowing cascade begins

**Failure type 4: Principle confusion**
- User activates wrong principle (attempts Wholeness but Purity activates)
- Result: Unintended effect; can cause catastrophic damage
- Example: Attempting to heal poisoned person using Wholeness but Purity activates instead—poison erased but person harmed in process

### Writer-Facing Rule: Trial and Error

**Every first or experimental use of Soulpulse must show:**
- Uncertainty (character unsure if it will work)
- Consequence (positive, negative, or mixed result)
- Learning (character adjusts understanding based on outcome)
- Cost (visible toll incurred)

**Cannot skip through learning process.** Each new technique/principle requires scene-time showing trial-and-error discovery.

---

## 9. FORBIDDEN LANGUAGE (PROSE LAW INTEGRATION)

### Banned Musical Metaphors (ABSOLUTE)

**The following terms are FORBIDDEN in any Soulpulse context:**

❌ Sing / Singing / Song  
❌ Harmony / Harmonic  
❌ Melody / Melodic  
❌ Orchestrate / Orchestra  
❌ Chord / Chords  
❌ Resonance (in musical sense; "vein-resonance" is OK; "melodic resonance" is NOT)  
❌ Hum / Humming (in musical sense; "humming sensation" of pressure is OK; "humming like a tuning fork" is NOT)  
❌ Tune / Tuning (in musical sense; only OK in clock/device context)  

### Why These Are Banned

Song-language implies:
- External orchestration (suggests manipulation by outside force; defeats Soulpulse as character-driven)
- Predefined harmony (suggests inevitability; defeats discovery through trial-and-error)
- Musical beauty (romanticizes pain; defeats visceral cost consequence)

### Approved Alternatives

**Instead of "sing/song":**
- Hum (pressure-sensation); buzz; whir; pulse; vibrate
- Scream (rupturing sensation); shriek; crack; shatter
- Groan (stressed state); creak; grind; strain

**Instead of "harmony":**
- Alignment; integration; balance; synchronization; coordination

**Instead of "resonance" (musical):**
- Echo; reverberation; vein-response; channel-activation

**Instead of "orchestra/orchestrate":**
- Coordinate; synchronize; arrange; order; pattern

**Instead of "tune":**
- Adjust; calibrate; focus; refine; stabilize

### Prose Law Enforcement

**QC check for every Soulpulse scene:**
- Search for banned musical terms
- Replace with approved alternatives
- Verify no romantic/beautiful language applied to magic (cost should feel visceral, not elegant)

## 1. WHAT THIS CANON IS (AND WHAT IT IS NOT)

### What This Document Contains

This is the **complete innocent-frame truth**—the surface narrative as experienced by characters and readers across all 30 novellas. It contains:

- The world as it was shattered by The Piercing in N1 Ch.3.
- Magic as emergent craft learned through trial, error, and consequence.
- Jhace as a survivor forced to master impossible power.
- Tiffani as a mentor with mysterious past and extraordinary skill.
- Four god-vessels awakening after The Piercing ruptures seals.
- Crises as cascading consequences of The Piercing and god-manifestation.
- Tiffani's death in N5 as permanent sacrifice; Fathombreak as Jhace's grief-driven apocalypse.

**No orchestration visible.** No foreshadowing of Tiffani's true agency. **All reveals held until N30.**

### What This Document Does NOT Contain

- Tiffani as Auditor or deliberate agent of catastrophe.
- The Piercing as engineered or preventable.
- Crises as tests or orchestrated events.
- Long-con architecture or multi-novella manipulation.
- Gods as predetermined forces or awakened-by-design.
- N30 paradox mechanics or universe-unmaking.

**Those truths live in:**
- `Canon_Guilty_Master_Part1.md`
- `Canon_Guilty_Master_Part2_N30.md`
- OmniMeta operating files only.

### Why Two Canons?

The **innocent canon** is what all Writer-facing deliverables contain. Writers generate prose that feels real, earned, and consequence-driven **without** knowing Tiffani orchestrated every tragedy.

The **guilty canon** is OmniMeta-only knowledge, revealing:
- Tiffani deliberately triggered The Piercing (alien projectile).
- She orchestrated Jhace's power growth through grief and loss.
- She engineered her own death to activate his Fathombreak.
- She's been alive the entire time, orchestrating the god-vessel wars.
- N30 reveals her true nature and N30 quote locks her confession.

**Result:** Readers experience a grounded, tragic love story with escalating stakes and seeming-randomness. Post-N30, rereading reveals every tragedy was **orchestrated with terrible love**.

---

## 2. THE PIERCING: THE CATASTROPHIC EVENT (N1 CH.3)

### What Is The Piercing?

**The Piercing** is a straight cylindrical projectile of composite alien material that passes **completely through Te'Oga** during N1 Chapter 3, visible to characters from multiple hemispheres simultaneously.

### Composition

The projectile comprises:
- **Glass** (crystalline structures, refractive surfaces)
- **Iron** (ferrous core, magnetic properties)
- **Pewter and Tin** (alloy sheathing, conductive elements)
- **Sand and Sediment** (accumulated particulates from transit through space/other worlds)
- **Unknown alien materials** (unidentifiable elements, cause vein-infection upon impact)

### The Event: Visible Manifestation

**What characters witness (N1 Ch.3, varies by location):**

**Grindheim (Underface):**
- Sky cracks open mid-chapter
- Projectile tears through atmosphere above city
- Sound: Mechanical shrieking, glass-shattering resonance
- Vision: Impossible geometry moving at impossible speed
- Duration: 30–60 seconds total visibility
- Aftermath: Temporary atmospheric rupture; heat grid destabilizes; people injured/killed in panic

**Shatterholm (Outer Crown):**
- Same projectile visible from opposite angle
- Passes overhead; creates localized pressure wave
- Sound reaches them 90 seconds after passage (transmission delay across gaping hole)
- Buildings shake; glass structures suffer immediate damage
- Casualties from structural collapse

**Mid-world locations:**
- Projectile too high to see directly; effects only secondary (ground tremor, pressure wave)
- Sky witnesses report "hole appearing, closing, appearing again" (parallax effect)

### What The Piercing Does to Te'Oga

1. **Creates straight gaping hole** — Bore is completely severed; world now has **permanent open passage** from Underface to Outer Crown to space beyond.

2. **Vein-infection** — The projectile's unknown materials embed themselves in the rupture zone; **all veins in Te'Oga become responsive to these alien frequencies**.

3. **Soulpulse awakens** — The vein-infection makes magic possible for the first time; veins throughout the world activate as conduits for power.

4. **Atmospheric rupture** — Immediate: pressure differential causes localized storms. Long-term: planetary atmosphere begins slow escape through the hole.

5. **Heat-grid destabilization** — Pre-Piercing heat grid breaks; new resonances needed to stabilize it.

6. **Seismic shock** — Passage creates massive seismic event (magnitude 7.5–8.0); aftershocks for weeks.

### Innocent-Frame Interpretation

**What characters believe:**
- Ancient seal (the Bore) has failed catastrophically.
- An unknowable "something" has penetrated the world.
- Magic suddenly becomes possible (veins respond to will/conviction for first time).
- Gods are awakening as a consequence of the seal rupture.
- The world is entering a new age; old ways are ending.

**What is NOT discussed:**
- Purpose of the projectile.
- Who sent it or why.
- Whether it was intentional or accidental.
- Nature of the alien materials.
- Connection between projectile and sudden magic-activation.

---

## 3. THE WORLD: TE'OGA POST-PIERCING

### Geography: The Open Wound

**Pre-Piercing:** Bore was a sealed cylindrical void.

**Post-Piercing:** World has a **straight gaping hole** (entry/exit wound permanent).

**Consequence:** 
- Underface and Outer Crown now directly connected (no Curtain barrier anymore).
- Line-of-sight possible between hemispheres for first time.
- Wind patterns chaotic; atmospheric pressure equalizing.
- Escape to space now possible (falling upward; lethal).

### Cities and Disruption

**Grindheim (Underface):**
- Located near entry wound
- Direct atmospheric exposure; temperature unstable
- Heat grid critically damaged; repair becomes story priority
- Population at risk; evacuation corridors activated
- Infrastructure collapse zone

**Shatterholm (Outer Crown):**
- Located near exit wound
- Pressure differential creates localized storm effects
- Glass architecture vulnerable; immediate damage
- Population at risk from architectural collapse
- Economic disruption (aerial trade routes severed)

**Forgeport, Cauldron-Hold, Prism, Velocity-Heights:**
- Regional disruption; secondary effects from seismic shock
- Infrastructure intact but economy fractured
- Refugees fleeing toward stable zones

### Timeline of Post-Piercing Crisis (N1–N5)

**N1 (First Turning Begins: "The Fractured Beginnings"):**
- Ch.1–2: Pre-Piercing normalcy
- Ch.3: The Piercing occurs; world ruptures
- Ch.4–15: Immediate aftermath; rescue attempts; first discovery of Soulpulse
- Jhace and Tiffani meet (partnership proposed)
- Innocent frame: They're trying to fix immediate crisis with no knowledge of what happened

**N2:**
- Repair work discovers hidden damage (N1 rush-job complications)
- Soulpulse learning accelerates (trial and error)
- First death from magic misuse (innocent frame: "too much power too fast")
- Tiffani's training of Jhace begins in earnest

**N3:**
- Infrastructure repairs make progress but reveal systemic corruption
- Poisoning crisis (civic negligence compounds disaster response)
- Jhace's first mentor/ally dies (Bram)
- Investigation into what caused the initial disruption (no answers; forbidden knowledge)

**N4:**
- Soulpulse use becomes normal; cost accumulation shows (tremor, thirst, pain)
- Jhace's Hollowing crisis (overwork driven by grief and guilt)
- Tiffani's hidden power revealed when she saves him
- Love deepens through acceptance of mystery

**N5:**
- God-vessels fully awaken (separate events across different cities)
- Sanitist suppression device deployed (innocent frame: attempt to stop magic use)
- Tiffani chooses to sacrifice herself
- **Fathombreak:** Jhace's grief-fueled power explosion
- He wields all four principles simultaneously (unprecedented, catastrophic)
- Portion of world section breaks free and drifts into space
- Mass casualties; gods fully manifest in mortal vessels

---

## 4. MAGIC SYSTEM: SOULPULSE (INNOCENT FRAME — LEARNED BY NECESSITY)

### Core Philosophy: Craft Born from Crisis

Magic in this world is **not ancient tradition**. It is **newly-awakened by The Piercing and learned through immediate necessity and trial/error**.

### How Magic Awakens (Innocent Frame)

1. **The Piercing ruptures world** → vein-infection spreads
2. **Veins activate** → people sense them for first time (pressure, humming, warmth)
3. **Desperation + conviction** → first practitioners accidentally harness vein-energy
4. **Results:** Objects stabilize, wounds heal, structures hold (unpredictably)
5. **Learning:** Trial and massive error; people die learning
6. **Cost:** Magic demands payment (physical damage, exhaustion, pain)

### What Is Soulpulse?

**Soulpulse** is the manipulation of **veins**—invisible stress channels in materials and bodies now activated by The Piercing's alien frequencies.

- **Access:** Anyone can sense veins post-Piercing; only those with **conviction** can manipulate them.
- **Conviction:** Psychological state of certainty, grounding, and willingness to accept cost.
- **Learning:** Years of practice expected; experts non-existent (all learning in real-time).

### The Four Principles (Manifestation)

Four distinct patterns of Soulpulse emerge organically as practitioners experiment:

#### Pattern 1: Form (Corlexi Tradition) — God-Vessel: Xilcore

- **Manifestation:** Perfect geometric manipulation; structures lock into precise patterns
- **Cost:** Precision fatigue, frozen hands, rigidity
- **First practitioner:** Tiffani (mysteriously exceptional; explains her through hidden training)
- **God-vessel name:** Xilcore (awakens after The Piercing, discovers followers using Form-pattern)
- **Vessel tradition name:** Corlexi (mortal embodiment of geometric principle)

#### Pattern 2: Wholeness (Salee Tradition) — God-Vessel: Leesa

- **Manifestation:** Healing integration; living things mend and integrate
- **Cost:** Tremor, thirst, emotional weight
- **First practitioner:** Jhace (discovers accidentally during N1 Ch.3 aftermath)
- **God-vessel name:** Leesa (awakens, discovers Jhace using Wholeness-pattern)
- **Vessel tradition name:** Salee (mortal embodiment of integrative principle)

#### Pattern 3: Purity (Mobel Tradition) — God-Vessel: Blemo

- **Manifestation:** Destructive elimination; things erase or accelerate decay
- **Cost:** Addiction, personality degradation, nerve death
- **First practitioner:** Sanitist enforcers (emerge mid-N2)
- **God-vessel name:** Blemo (awakens, finds followers using Purity-pattern for "cleansing")
- **Vessel tradition name:** Mobel (mortal embodiment of purifying principle)

#### Pattern 4: Entropy (Eries Tradition) — God-Vessel: Seeri

- **Manifestation:** Graceful release; things collapse naturally, painlessly
- **Cost:** Depression, loss of ambition, paralysis
- **First practitioner:** Isolated philosophers (N3+)
- **God-vessel name:** Seeri (awakens, discovers contemplatives seeking release through Entropy)
- **Vessel tradition name:** Eries (mortal embodiment of entropic principle)

### Anagram God-Vessel Names (Innocent-Frame Significance)

Each divine principle manifests through anagrammatic name-pairs, reflecting the interchangeability of cosmic and mortal expression:

| Principle | God Name | Vessel Name | Anagram |
|-----------|----------|-------------|---------|
| Form | Xilcore | Corlexi | ↔ |
| Purity | Blemo | Mobel | ↔ |
| Wholeness | Leesa | Salee | ↔ |
| Entropy | Seeri | Eries | ↔ |

**Innocent-frame perception:** The names are poetic echoes; god and mortal bearer are linguistically mirrored. Readers may not consciously register this pattern, but it creates linguistic resonance reinforcing the unity of principle and manifestation.

### Dual-Principle Anomaly: Jhace's Paradox

**Normal practitioners align with ONE pattern only.**

**Jhace wields Wholeness + secondary pattern (Decay/Entropy hybrid) simultaneously.**

**Why this shouldn't work:** Patterns oppose each other → veins shred → death.

**Why Jhace survives:** 
- Innocent frame: "unknown survivor's luck" or "natural aptitude"
- Guilty frame: Tiffani's orchestration; she taught him dual-wielding deliberately

**Cost:** Asymmetric damage (right hand suffers more than left; both accumulate scars across N1–N5)

### Costs: What Soulpulse Demands

**Every act of magic demands payment:**

- **Hand tremor** (nerve damage from sustained use)
- **Chronic thirst** (metabolic exhaustion)
- **Tinnitus** (auditory feedback from vein-resonance)
- **Rib pain** (Tiffani's chronic condition from velding)
- **Back strain** (Jhace's pressure-load compensation)
- **Sleep debt** (recovery period after major use)
- **Nosebleeds** (warning sign of internal resonance damage)
- **Numbness** (sensory fade; can become permanent)

**Terminal cost: Hollowing** (complete burnout; channels shred; potential death; permanent capacity loss)

### Soulpulse Learning by Trial and Error

**No instruction manual exists.** Discovery happens through:

1. **Accident:** Character attempts something; vein responds or rejects
2. **Consequence:** Character takes damage or experiences failure
3. **Adaptation:** Character adjusts approach based on feedback
4. **Skill:** Repeated successful attempts build mastery
5. **Cost accumulation:** Each use adds permanent damage

**Narrative consequence:** Readers experience magic learning in real-time with characters; no hand-waving or instant competence.

---

## 5. CHARACTERS: JHACE AND TIFFANI (INNOCENT TRUTHS)

### A. Jhace Torrins (Innocent Frame)

**Primary archetype:** Survivor-turned-teacher; person of extraordinary competence forced into magical mastery through cascading crises.

**Competency philosophy:**
- Defines himself and others by capacity to work and survive.
- "Everyone deserves to know how to fix what breaks them."
- This becomes his pedagogical mission across N1–N30.

**Soulpulse journey (N1–N5):**
- **N1 Ch.3:** Witnesses The Piercing; senses veins activating in panicking crowd; instinctively stabilizes a child (first Wholeness use)
- **N1–N2:** Learns Soulpulse by accident through partnership with Tiffani; cost appears immediately (tremor, thirst)
- **N3:** Attempts to heal poisoned victims; several die; guilt accumulates; Bram's death shatters him; griefs compounds use
- **N4:** Obsessive overwork (addiction); Hollowing crisis; Tiffani saves him using impossible dual-principle healing; he witnesses her true power; emerges with new philosophy ("stopping is also craft")
- **N5:** Relationship deepened; Tiffani chooses sacrifice; Jhace experiences maximum grief → Fathombreak → wields all four principles simultaneously → section of world breaks free

**Hand damage progression (N1–N5, innocent frame perception):**
- **N1 Ch.3:** 0% loss
- **N1 end:** 60% right, 40% left (tremor public; first visible cost)
- **N2 end:** 54% right, 36% left (slow recovery through Wholeness self-healing discovered by accident)
- **N3 end:** 52% right, 34% left (improving, but Bram's death forces regression)
- **N4:** Regresses to 62% right, 42% left (Hollowing; complete neurological shutdown; recovery uncertain)
- **N5:** Post-Fathombreak 48% right, 28% left (new power unlocks; capacity appears to increase, but cost will be revealed later)

**Emotional arc (N1–N5, innocent frame):**
- **N1:** Isolation → Partnership; worker becomes partner
- **N2:** Competence → Vulnerability; skills insufficient against systemic problems
- **N3:** Grief → Witnessing; loss teaches him system is broken
- **N4:** Addiction → Discipline; learns to stop and accept limits
- **N5:** Love → Sacrifice → Fathombreak; personal loss triggers cosmic transformation

### B. Tiffani Merrow (Innocent Frame)

**Primary archetype:** Mentor-warrior; person of extraordinary skill who guides others without controlling. She is the teacher, the healer, the one who makes transformation possible.

**Mysterious background (innocent frame):**
- Trained by "someone exceptional" (cannot say more)
- Lost partner Senna 7 years ago (Salee binding)
- Traveled to Grindheim seeking skilled person ("reputation-seeking")
- Proposes partnership with Jhace after witnessing his dual-principle Wholeness use in N1 Ch.3

**Strategic thinking (innocent frame interpretation):**
- Reads situations faster than others (talent/intuition, not orchestration)
- Sees three moves ahead (pattern recognition, not foresight)
- Protective beyond normal (trauma response, not agenda)

**Soulpulse journey (N1–N5, innocent frame):**
- **N1 Ch.3:** Witnesses The Piercing; observes Jhace's impossible dual-principle Wholeness use; immediately recognizes significance; proposes partnership
- **N1–N2:** Teaches Jhace velding techniques (Form-pattern); her mastery suggests years of training elsewhere
- **N2:** Ch.2 revelation of Senna's death (Salee binding erasure); shared vulnerability with Jhace
- **N2–N3:** Discovers she inadvertently caused N1 stress-risers (overwork); confesses; Jhace accepts as learning cost; emotional walls lower
- **N3:** Grieves with Jhace over Bram's death; parallel loss (Senna + Bram); bonded through shared trauma
- **N4:** Jhace's Hollowing forces her into public healing miracle using dual-principle techniques (Form-locks internal veins + Wholeness-braiding simultaneously); reveals power far beyond what she's shown; Jhace questions who she really is; she fears rejection; confesses **partial truth** (trained exceptionally, cannot say by whom, doesn't want him to leave)
- **N5:** Relationship at maximum intimacy; recognizes Sanitist suppression device as threat to Jhace; chooses sacrifice with calm acceptance; final scene tells Jhace "I love you" (first explicit statement); **dies shielding him**

**Vein-burn progression (N1–N5, innocent frame visibility):**
- **N1 opening:** 3cm visible vein-burn (chronic Form-use damage)
- **N2 end:** 4cm visible (N2 cumulative Form-locks)
- **N3 end:** 4.2cm visible (escalating deterioration)
- **N4 end:** 4.5cm visible (critical threshold)
- **N5 pre-sacrifice:** 5cm visible (maximum Form-locks; internal detonation imminent)

**Why progression matters:** Astute readers notice escalation and fear for her safety; foreshadows sacrifice without meta-telegraphing.

**Innocent-framed complexity:**
- Presented as exceptionally well-trained (elite training from somewhere better)
- Intuitive about systems and people (reads situations faster than others)
- Carries unexplained trauma (Senna's death, mysterious training, hidden identity)
- Protective intensity seems loving, not creepy
- Willing to sacrifice without hesitation (framed as devotion, not predetermined obligation)

**None of this is untrue.** It is simply incomplete.

---

## 6. THE SIX TURNINGS: 30-NOVELLA STRUCTURE

### The Six Turnings Defined

Each Turning comprises 5 novellas and represents a distinct narrative phase of escalating crisis, god-manifestation, and Jhace's power growth.

#### THE FIRST TURNING: "The Fractured Beginnings" (N1–N5)

**Thematic arc:** The Piercing ruptures world (N1 Ch.3); Jhace and Tiffani's partnership forms; magic awakens through necessity; gods manifest in mortal vessels; Fathombreak apocalypse.

- **N1:** Piercing occurs; Jhace/Tiffani meet; partnership begins
- **N2:** Damage reveals hidden costs; partnership tested through truth
- **N3:** Systemic corruption exposed; first major loss (Bram); Jhace hardens
- **N4:** Hollowing crisis; Tiffani's power revealed; love deepened through acceptance of mystery
- **N5:** Fathombreak; Tiffani's sacrifice; gods fully awaken; world section breaks free

#### THE SECOND TURNING: "The World Learned To Hum" (N6–N10)

**Thematic arc:** Post-Fathombreak silence; world adjusts to open sky and new resonances; gods consolidate in mortal vessels; Jhace discovers new power capacity; apprenticeships emerge as magic becomes normal.

#### THE THIRD TURNING: "The Gods Walk" (N11–N15)

**Thematic arc:** God-vessels openly operate; competing ideologies clash; Jhace encounters first Vessel; resistance networks form; heat-grid disruption spreads; doctrine wars begin.

#### THE FOURTH TURNING: "The Un-bound Rise" (N16–N20)

**Thematic arc:** Doctrine wars escalate; alliances shatter and reform; betrayals burn deep; Jhace's crew fractured; god-vessels lose restraint; factions wage open war; civilian casualties mount.

#### THE FIFTH TURNING: "The World Takes Sides" (N21–N25)

**Thematic arc:** Corridor wars; heat-grid becomes literal battlefield; Jhace's role as system-keeper critical; investigation into Piercing origin begins; sides harden irreversibly; gods consolidate territory.

#### THE SIXTH TURNING: "The Five-Fold War" (N26–N30)

**Thematic arc:** Battle Royale (N26–N29); four god-vessels + Jhace wielding all principles simultaneously; system collapse; everything fails; Tiffani's reveal (N30); universe recognizes construction of itself.

---

- Plot: Crises as material consequences of The Piercing; love as earned through vulnerability; Tiffani's death as permanent sacrifice

- N30 ending: Universe recognizes itself as constructed; page goes blank

# Te’Oga — Art Spec v3: Forge-Punk + Glass-Punk, Zero Earth Echoes
- **Bore geometry:** one perfectly circular entrance in the **north-west** quadrant as seen from camera front; opposite side reads as a **prismatic Nullgate lens** so it still *looks* like a through-hole from distance, matching your “straight gaping hole” event without breaking innocent canon optics. fileciteturn2file1  
- **Surface language:** dump all Earth silhouettes. Build macro-masses from **forged geology** and **etched-glass hydrology**: gear-tooth peninsulas, crown-rim archipelagos, spoked atolls, petaled inland seas with hex or radial shorelines. Coastlines should feel like stress-fracture fans and casting seams, not river erosion.  
- **Biomes:** habitable, yes, but manufactured by stress and craft. Emerald-teal seas over veined seafloors; jade pans and obsidian shelves near the rim; cloud bands curl into the bore mouth.  
- **Civilization cues:**  
  - **Underface:** basalt anvil-cities, counterweight gantries, open furnace canyons. Muscle, iron, slag-glass.  
  - **Outer Crown:** ribbed null-glass domes, refractor towers, light-mills, prismatic kites riding the ring-storm. No steam. No brass cosplay.  
- **Palette:** Teal/cerulean water; jade-glass basins; oxidized iron reds; furnace oranges within the lip; prismatic highlights around the Nullgate.  
- **Magic affordances:** leave subtle “vein” filigree in crust and structures for Soulpulse scenes; nothing musical, nothing pretty-for-pretty’s-sake. Cost and consequence are the vibe. fileciteturn2file0  

# Shot List Prompts (drop-in, model-ready)
Use these verbatim with your favorite image tool. They’re modular and safe with your canon.

**A. Orbital Hero**  
“Venus-scale habitable world ‘Te’Oga’. Perfect circular **entrance bore** in the planet’s north-west quadrant; on the far side a **prismatic Nullgate lens** that reads like a distant hole. Continents are non-terrestrial: forged-geology silhouettes, gear-tooth peninsulas, crown-rim archipelagos, spoked atolls; etched-glass seafloor veins. Underface shows forge-punk scars and anvil-cities; Outer Crown shows glass-punk domes and refractor towers. A high toroidal storm belt girdles the world. Teal seas, jade basins, oxidized iron and furnace orange at the rim, prismatic highlights. No steam tech. No Earth shapes.”

**B. Rim Close-up**  
“Bore lip: vitrified, with shear-petals and obsidian drips; warm interior glow fading to graphite. Wind-torn cloud bands curling inward; lightning veils. On the opposite horizon, a shimmering **Nullgate** with interference fringes that distort starfields.”

**C. City Scale (Crown)**  
“Strathmoor-style glass domes with ribbed null-glass, light-mills, refractor towers; plazas patterned like stress maps. In-world UI props: six-step craft tools, gauges, lattice shields. No musical metaphors in inscriptions.”

**D. City Scale (Underface)**  
“Grindheim-style anvil-city terraced into basalt; chain gantries, counterweights, furnace glow; slag-glass culverts. Air full of ash-spark and dust halos.”

# Te’Oga_Physical_Pierced — v0.1 Physics Brief (for your repo)
Short, sharp, and drawable. Stick this in your “Next Files” list you flagged.

**1) Geometry**  
- Bore is a **straight cylindrical passage** from Underface to Outer Crown; visible line-of-sight now exists hemisphere to hemisphere. The far side presents as a prismatic lens that often reads as a hole from distance. fileciteturn2file1

**2) Atmosphere & Weather**  
- Immediate pressure differential created the ring-storm girdle; long-term wind bands arc into the bore mouth; localized lightning sheets are common at the lip. Expect chaotic gusts and sonic booms near transit path during the first months. fileciteturn2file1

**3) Vein Activation**  
- Alien projectile seeded **vein-infection**, making veins responsive to conviction. Population develops sensitivity unevenly; magic appears as crisis craft learned under fire, with physical cost every time. fileciteturn2file0

**4) Cost Reality (Art/FX constraints)**  
- Anytime a character visibly manipulates matter, show toll markers: tremor, thirst, nosebleed risk, posture collapse. No free miracles, ever. fileciteturn2file0

**5) Navigation & Safety**  
- Approach vectors along the bore lip must depict turbulent micro-vortices and glassfall hazards. Far-side Nullgate produces lensing and shimmering interference bands against stars; keep it physically weird but readable. fileciteturn2file1

**6) Cultural Fallout Visuals**  
- Underface: furnace belts down, heat-grid repair in frantic scaffolds. Crown: shattered refractors, dome patch-kits, refugee kites chasing stable winds. Both sides show improvised “vein maps” painted on walls and roads. fileciteturn2file1

# Guardrails you cannot break
- Magic is **new**, learned by **trial/error**, and always **hurts**. Show consequence in bodies and infrastructure. fileciteturn2file0  
- The Piercing is the reader-visible catalyst. No orchestration breadcrumbs in innocent-frame art or prose. fileciteturn2file1

# Forbidden_Modern_Terms_TeOga_Alternatives.md

**Document Version**: 1.0  
**Created**: October 30, 2025 (23:39 CDT)  
**Authority**: Immutable language restrictions  
**Scope**: Modern Earth terminology banned; Te'Ogan-appropriate alternatives locked  
**Status**: QC ENFORCEMENT—all files must comply; violations flagged and corrected  

---

## ABSOLUTE PROHIBITION: Modern Earth Terminology

No modern Earth words or contemporary concepts appear in any deliverable.

Te'Oga is a forge-glass culture in renaissance-to-industrial transition. Citizens speak in craft and material metaphors. Scientific terminology must feel indigenous to the world, not imported from Earth.

---

## BANNED TERMS & APPROVED ALTERNATIVES

### SEISMIC EVENTS

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Earthquake** | Ground-break, rupture-shred, earth-crack, tremor-break | "The ground-break threw people down" |
| **Seismic** | Vein-shatter, ground-resonance, crack-pulse | "The vein-shatter waves spread outward" |
| **Aftershock** | Followshock, afterbreak, tremor-echo | "Followshocks continued for days" |
| **Magnitude** | Strength-class, break-scale, rupture-grade | "A rupture-grade 7 break-event" |
| **Epicenter** | Break-point, rupture-heart, wound-center | "The break-point was Grindheim" |
| **Fault line** | Vein-crack, structural-break, rupture-seam | "The vein-crack ran deep" |
| **Tectonic** | Foundational-break, world-seam, structural-fracture | "Foundational-break pressures built" |

### ATMOSPHERIC/WEATHER

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Tsunami** | Pressure-surge, air-wave, void-rush | "The pressure-surge knocked buildings flat" |
| **Hurricane/Tornado** | Void-storm, wind-spiral, pressure-break | "The void-storm tore through the city" |
| **Storm** | Veil-break, pressure-chaos, wind-chaos | "The pressure-chaos lasted three days" |
| **Wind** | Air-flow, pressure-current, void-movement | "The pressure-current was ferocious" |
| **Pressure** | Vein-weight, air-press, crush-force | "The vein-weight increased steadily" |
| **Atmosphere** | Air-veil, breathing-layer, sky-hold | "The air-veil destabilized" |
| **Vortex** | Wind-spiral, pressure-turn, void-lock | "A pressure-turn formed over the city" |
| **Lightning** | Sky-break, void-rupture, spark-cascade | "Sky-breaks illuminated the chaos" |

### STRUCTURAL/ENGINEERING

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Collapse** | Break-down, rupture, structure-fail | "The building rupture killed dozens" |
| **Damage** | Break-state, fracture-mark, wound | "The fracture-mark spread across the dome" |
| **Infrastructure** | Craft-hold, vein-network, structure-web | "The craft-hold fractured everywhere" |
| **Building** | Structure, hold, craft-house | "The structure fell inward" |
| **Foundation** | Base-lock, ground-hold, craft-root | "The craft-root shifted beneath them" |
| **Scaffold** | Hold-frame, rise-cage, work-lattice | "The hold-frame shattered" |

### GEOLOGICAL

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Rock** | Stone, craft-matter, vein-host | "The stone fractured like glass" |
| **Core** | World-heart, heat-center, flame-deep | "The world-heart glowed visible through the hole" |
| **Crust** | World-skin, surface-shell, stone-veil | "The world-skin cracked open" |
| **Mantle** | Deep-vein, world-blood, heat-layer | "The deep-vein pressure released" |
| **Erosion** | Wear-break, time-crack, decay-flow | "Wear-break has widened the hole" |
| **Landslide** | Stone-fall, slope-break, ground-tumble | "A ground-tumble buried the lower city" |

### ASTRONOMICAL/COSMIC

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Space** | Void, sky-beyond, eternal-nothing | "Falling into the void meant death" |
| **Gravity** | Pull, world-draw, vein-weight | "The world-draw pulled them downward" |
| **Orbit** | Sky-path, void-circle, eternal-turn | "The eternal-turn of the stars never changed" |
| **Vacuum** | Void-empty, breath-nothing, dead-air | "The void-empty pulled the air upward" |
| **Stellar** | Star-, void-light, sky-fire | "The star-light had become strange" |

### SCIENTIFIC (Generally Banned)

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Physics** | Craft-law, vein-rule, structural-truth | "The craft-law of vein-response" |
| **Energy** | Power, vein-draw, craft-force | "The vein-draw increased exponentially" |
| **Frequency** | Resonance, vein-pulse, craft-rhythm | "The vein-pulse accelerated" |
| **Wavelength** | Resonance-span, vein-distance, craft-reach | "The resonance-span shortened" |
| **Radiation** | Core-shine, heat-pour, vein-glow | "The core-shine increased through the hole" |
| **Temperature** | Heat-state, warmth-grade, craft-burn | "The heat-state fluctuated wildly" |

### WATER/FLUID

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage Context |
|---|---|---|
| **Water** | Water (or fluid, liquid, craft-flow) | "Water poured from broken pipes" |
| **Flood** | Deluge, water-break, torrent | "The deluge swept through lower streets" |
| **Current** | Flow, vein-pull, water-path | "The water-path curved eastward" |
| **Wave** | Surge, water-rise, pressure-swell | "The surge crashed against the wall" |

### COMMON WORDS TO AVOID

| Modern (BANNED) | Te'Ogan Alternative | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| **Modern** | Contemporary, current, craft-era | Describe time periods |
| **Technology** | Craft, craft-work, craft-method | Describe tools/systems |
| **Machine** | Craft-device, work-mechanism, heat-engine | Describe mechanical systems |
| **Scientist** | Craftmaster, vein-scholar, resonance-keeper | Describe practitioners |
| **Research** | Craft-study, vein-work, resonance-inquiry | Describe investigation |
| **Power** | Strength, vein-draw, craft-force | Describe capability (NOT electrical) |
| **Energy** | Craft-force, vein-draw, life-strength | Describe vitality |
| **System** | Craft-hold, vein-network, structure | Describe organized things |

---

## SPECIAL CASES: Craft-Specific Language

### Heat Grid (Allowed Terms)
- **Heat grid** ✅ (established term in canon; Te'Ogan name for infrastructure)
- **Heat-flow** ✅ (craft perspective)
- **Heat-node** ✅ (connection points)
- **Heat-vein** ✅ (distribution channels; ties to Soulpulse metaphor)
- **Thermal zone** ✅ (region controlled by grid)
- **Grid-keeper** ✅ (operator role)

### Soulpulse-Specific (Allowed Terms)
- **Vein** ✅ (invisible stress channels)
- **Vein-response** ✅ (how veins react to will)
- **Conviction** ✅ (psychological state required)
- **Resonance** ✅ (when veins activate; NOT musical sense)
- **Vein-burn** ✅ (Tiffani's visible scarring)
- **Hollowing** ✅ (burnout state)

### God-Vessel (Allowed Terms)
- **God-vessel** ✅ (mortal bearing divine principle)
- **Vessel** ✅ (the practitioner themselves)
- **Principle** ✅ (Form, Wholeness, Purity, Entropy)
- **Divine** ✅ (god-related; OK in innocent frame before N30)
- **Godlike** ✅ (describing immense power)
